hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, subprocess, sys, datetime
from pathlib import Path

state_path = Path('catalog/session_state.json')
if not state_path.exists():
    sys.exit(0)

with open(state_path) as f:
    state = json.load(f)

head = subprocess.run(['git', 'rev-parse', '--short', 'HEAD'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
branch = subprocess.run(['git', 'branch', '--show-current'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
known_sha = state.get('known_state', {}).get('main_sha', '')
last_platform = state.get('last_platform', 'unknown')

if head != known_sha:
    print()
    print('╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗')
    print('║  SESSION HANDOFF REMINDER                                ║')
    print('╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣')
    print(f'║  HEAD:          {head:<42}║')
    print(f'║  Last recorded: {known_sha:<42}║')
    print(f'║  Branch:        {branch:<42}║')
    print('╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣')
    print('║  Before closing, update catalog/session_state.json:      ║')
    print('║  • last_platform = \"claude-code\"                        ║')
    print('║  • last_updated  = \"' + datetime.datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ') + '\"             ║')
    print('║  • known_state.main_sha = \"' + head + '\"              ║')
    print('║  • recent_commits — append this session\'s commits        ║')
    print('║  • active_task — set status=\"suspended\" if mid-task      ║')
    print('╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝')
    print()
"
